positive: A majestic celestial fox spirit, rendered in a highly stylized, symmetrical neo-Art Deco graphic style. The fox is centered, coiled in a dramatic, regal pose, framed by swirling nebulae and cosmic crystalline structures. The scene utilizes limited, high-contrast colors: deep indigo, royal purple, glowing gold accents, and ethereal teal. Focus on crisp, strong silhouettes and clean vector-like linework. The background should be a stylized cosmic mandala pattern, ensuring perfect cut-out potential for apparel printing. Highly detailed, suitable for screen printing, clean lines, maximal contrast, 8k, hyper-stylized vector art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, low detail, photographic, realistic, grayscale, amateur drawing
